# Part 2: Hotspot Content

-   [Content Permissions](ContentPermissions.qmd)
    -   [Assigning Content Editing Permissions](AssigningContentEditingPermissions.qmd)
-   [Hotspot Content](HotspotContent.qmd)
    -   [Managing Languages](ManagingLanguages.qmd)
    -   [Links](Links.qmd)
    -   [Content Edit History](ContentEditHistory.qmd)
    -   [Auto-Approval](Auto-Approval.qmd)
-   [Reviewing Content Suggestions](Reviewingcontentsuggestions.qmd)
    -   [Pending Suggestions](Pendingsuggestions.qmd)
    -   [Reviewed Suggestions](Reviewedsuggestions.qmd)
-   [Hotspot Content FAQs](HotspotcontentFAQs.qmd)
